first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The scores are the same (5/10), and the justifications, strengths, and concerns all point to the same core issues: a lack of specific experience in embedded networking security, C for UNIX, and Japanese language proficiency. The minor differences in wording and ordering are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's location changing from Germany to Nigeria.
